sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87328" key="proecegei/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεξ-εγείρω</orth>, <sense id="n87328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stir up prematurely,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρᾶγμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.101B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.101B.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
